prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔在二战期间帮助人们寻找失踪亲属
prophecies.a: 他能准确描述失踪士兵的生死状况、所在位置或被俘地点。据记录，数百个家庭从他那里获得了亲人的消息，其中大部分信息后来被证实准确。
prophecies.q_en: Irlmaier helped locate missing persons during WWII
prophecies.a_en: He could accurately describe the condition and whereabouts of missing soldiers — whether alive, dead, or captured. Hundreds of families reportedly received information about their loved ones, most of which was later confirmed.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 多名当事人及后人的证词记录在案。1947年法庭审理时，多位证人出庭证实伊尔迈尔提供的失踪者信息准确。法庭最终裁定他的能力真实存在，宣判无罪。
prophecies.verdict_en: Numerous testimonies from families were documented. During his 1947 trial, multiple witnesses confirmed the accuracy of his information about missing persons. The court ultimately ruled his abilities genuine and acquitted him.

prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔预测弗赖拉辛的空袭
prophecies.a: 他多次提前警告当地居民即将发生空袭，指出炸弹落点的精确位置，帮助人们提前转移到安全地带。
prophecies.q_en: Irlmaier predicted air raids on Freilassing
prophecies.a_en: He repeatedly warned local residents of impending air raids, pointing out the exact locations where bombs would fall, helping people evacuate to safety in advance.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 弗赖拉辛多位居民证实伊尔迈尔曾在空袭前发出准确警告。他甚至指出具体哪些房屋会被炸毁、哪些会幸存。这些证词成为1947年法庭审理的关键证据。
prophecies.verdict_en: Multiple Freilassing residents confirmed Irlmaier's accurate warnings before air raids. He even specified which houses would be destroyed and which would survive. These testimonies became key evidence in his 1947 trial.

prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔描述未来的中东冲突引爆大战
prophecies.a: 「一切从中东开始。在那里有一次大规模的军事冲突，然后大事来临。一位重要的政治人物将在中东被暗杀或暗杀未遂，这成为导火索。」
prophecies.q_en: Irlmaier described a Middle East conflict triggering a great war
prophecies.a_en: "Everything starts in the Middle East. There is a large-scale military conflict there, then the big thing comes. An important political figure will be assassinated or there will be an assassination attempt in the Middle East — this becomes the trigger."

prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔描述俄军突然入侵欧洲
prophecies.a: 「俄国人夜间突然向西推进，穿过三条楔形路线。一路沿北海方向推进，一路穿过中欧直达莱茵河，第三路经巴尔干半岛向西南推进。一切发生得非常突然，西方毫无准备。」
prophecies.q_en: Irlmaier described a sudden Russian invasion of Europe
prophecies.a_en: "The Russians advance westward overnight in three wedges. One pushes toward the North Sea, one through Central Europe to the Rhine, and a third through the Balkans to the southwest. It all happens very suddenly — the West is completely unprepared."

prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔描述战争中使用的异常武器
prophecies.a: 「我看到飞机投下黄色粉尘。凡是接触到这种粉尘的人，无论是人还是牲畜，都会当场死亡。植物枯萎变黑。但不要打开窗户，把窗户和门用黑纸或黑布遮严。」
prophecies.q_en: Irlmaier described unusual weapons used in war
prophecies.a_en: "I see planes dropping yellow dust. Whoever comes into contact with it dies instantly — people and livestock alike. Plants wither and turn black. Do not open windows. Cover all windows and doors with black paper or cloth."

prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔描述三日黑暗
prophecies.a: 「然后黑暗降临，持续整整三天三夜。白天你无法看到自己的手指。在这段时间里，不要点蜡烛以外的任何光源。电灯不会亮。谁吸入粉尘就会死。关闭一切门窗，用黑布遮挡。」
prophecies.q_en: Irlmaier described the Three Days of Darkness
prophecies.a_en: "Then darkness falls, lasting exactly three days and three nights. During the day you cannot see your own fingers. Do not light anything other than blessed candles. Electric lights will not work. Whoever breathes in the dust will die. Close all doors and windows, cover them with black cloth."

prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔描述大彗星或小行星撞击
prophecies.a: 「战争结束时，我看到天空中有一个巨大的十字架。地球颤抖。一颗巨大的天体从太空坠入大海——大西洋。海水翻涌到极高的地方，淹没了大片海岸地区。」
prophecies.q_en: Irlmaier described a great comet or asteroid impact
prophecies.a_en: "At the end of the war, I see a great cross in the sky. The earth trembles. A massive body falls from space into the sea — the Atlantic. The water surges to tremendous heights, flooding vast coastal areas."

prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔描述战后的社会革命
prophecies.a: 「战后人们非常愤怒。他们抓住那些有权势的人。街上发生暴力事件。没有人愿意再当士兵。法律和秩序暂时崩溃。但这不会持续太久。」
prophecies.a_en: "After the war, people are very angry. They seize those in power. Violence breaks out in the streets. No one wants to be a soldier anymore. Law and order collapse temporarily. But this won't last long."

prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔描述战后新货币
prophecies.a: 「旧的货币将毫无价值。新的货币出现了。一段时间内没有钱可用，但情况很快好转。新的货币是好的。」
prophecies.q_en: Irlmaier described a new currency after the war
prophecies.a_en: "The old money will be worthless. A new currency appears. For a while there is no usable money, but things improve quickly. The new currency is good."

prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔预言战前的经济繁荣与通胀
prophecies.a: 「在大事发生之前，会有一段前所未有的繁荣时期。金钱到处都是，但它变得越来越不值钱。人们不再满足于现有的一切，整个世界生活在虚假的富裕中。」
prophecies.q_en: Irlmaier predicted pre-war prosperity and inflation
prophecies.a_en: "Before the big thing happens, there will be a period of unprecedented prosperity. Money is everywhere, but it becomes increasingly worthless. People are never satisfied, and the whole world lives in false affluence."

prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔预言战前的道德堕落
prophecies.a: 「信仰越来越少，人们不再去教堂。年轻人穿着怪异，变得越来越不虔诚。一切都变得混乱。人们不再尊重彼此。」
prophecies.q_en: Irlmaier predicted moral decline before the war
prophecies.a_en: "Faith diminishes, people stop going to church. Young people dress strangely and become increasingly irreverent. Everything becomes chaotic. People no longer respect one another."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 西欧的世俗化趋势确实在持续——教堂出席率从二战后逐步下降，到21世纪初多国定期参加宗教活动的人口已不足20%。年轻人着装和社会风气的变化也与描述吻合。但这类社会趋势的「预言」缺乏时间精确性，属于泛化预测。
prophecies.verdict_en: Secularization in Western Europe has indeed continued — church attendance has declined steadily since WWII, with regular religious participation falling below 20% in many countries by the early 21st century. Changes in youth fashion and social attitudes also match. However, such broad social trend 'predictions' lack temporal specificity and constitute generalized forecasting.

prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔描述战争持续时间极短
prophecies.a: 「整场战争不会持续很久。从俄国人推进到一切结束，大约只有三个月的时间。」
prophecies.q_en: Irlmaier described the war as extremely short
prophecies.a_en: "The entire war won't last long. From the Russian advance to the end of everything, it's only about three months."

prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔描述战后的和平与信仰复兴
prophecies.a: 「三日黑暗之后，阳光再次升起。一切变得美好而平静。一个漫长的和平时期开始了。那些幸存下来的人重新开始信仰上帝。这是一个新的开始。」
prophecies.q_en: Irlmaier described post-war peace and spiritual renewal
prophecies.a_en: "After the three days of darkness, the sun rises again. Everything becomes beautiful and peaceful. A long era of peace begins. The survivors return to faith in God. It is a new beginning."

prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔预言二战德国战败
prophecies.a: 「战争会输掉。我们的城市会变成废墟。但之后会重新建设，一切会比以前更好。」
prophecies.q_en: Irlmaier predicted Germany's defeat in WWII
prophecies.a_en: "The war will be lost. Our cities will be reduced to rubble. But afterward, everything will be rebuilt, and it will be better than before."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1945年5月德国无条件投降。德国主要城市在盟军轰炸中严重受损，战后在马歇尔计划等援助下迅速重建，经历了「经济奇迹」（Wirtschaftswunder），经济水平远超战前。
prophecies.verdict_en: Germany surrendered unconditionally in May 1945. Major German cities were heavily damaged by Allied bombing. Post-war reconstruction, aided by the Marshall Plan, led to the 'Wirtschaftswunder' (economic miracle), with economic levels far surpassing pre-war standards.

prophecies.q: 伊尔迈尔描述未来欧洲大规模难民潮
prophecies.a: 「我看到大批人从东方涌来，向西逃亡。他们成群结队，手推车上装满了他们仅有的财物。道路挤满了人。」
prophecies.q_en: Irlmaier described a massive European refugee crisis
prophecies.a_en: "I see masses of people coming from the east, fleeing westward. They move in large groups, their carts loaded with all their possessions. The roads are clogged with people."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2015年欧洲难民危机期间，超过百万难民从中东和北非涌入欧洲。然而伊尔迈尔描述的是从东方（俄军入侵方向）的逃亡，与实际难民路线方向不完全一致。难民危机的场景与描述部分吻合，但背景和原因不同。
prophecies.verdict_en: During the 2015 European refugee crisis, over a million refugees entered Europe from the Middle East and North Africa. However, Irlmaier described flight from the east (the direction of Russian invasion), which doesn't fully match actual refugee routes. The visual scene partially matches, but the context and causes differ.
